raw.official description: Damage blocked by barriers increases Particle Cannon damage.
raw.ability details: * Energy is gained by blocking damage with ''Could not find 'Particle Barrier' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' and ''Could not find 'Projected Barrier' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' (max. 100%). * Energy starts decaying 2 seconds after last gaining Energy at a rate of 2% per second. * Energy instantly resets to 0 upon death. ([[File:Ability-mercy5.png|sub|link=Mercy#Resurrect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mercy#Resurrect|Resurrect]] does not restore Energy.) * The more Energy Zarya has, the brighter she glows.'"`UNIQ--ref-00000075-QINU`"' * 50% or higher is considered "High Energy."

raw.official description: Hits with Particle Cannon's secondary fire generate 2 energy.

abilities.name: Graviton Crush

raw.official description: Graviton Surge deals up to 40% of enemy max health as damage over time.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Damage per second: ~8.37% of max HP
* This replaces the baseline periodic damage dealt.
* Periodic damage completely ignores all [[damage modification]].

raw.shot type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
raw.official description: Secondary Fire's self-knockback is increased by 75%.
Projected Barrier activates ally health regeneration and increases their movement speed by 20%.
Create a damage barrier around you.
raw.ability details: * Charges are shared with ''Could not find 'Projected Barrier' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. The charge cooldown of the next charge is set depending on which ability was used. * Zarya gains 0.2% Energy per damage blocked by the barrier, or 1% Energy per 5 damage blocked. ** Single Particle Barrier can generate up to 45 energy before it breaks. * Another Particle Barrier cannot be cast while Zarya is affected by her own Personal Barrier, Projected Barrier from another Zarya or enemy Domina's [[File:ULT Panopticon.png|sub|link=Domina#Panopticon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Domina#Panopticon|Panopticon]]. * While the barrier is up, Zarya is immune to all damage and most negative [[status effect]]s, even if the attack pierces [[barrier]]s. ** Removes and prevents slowed, hacked, hindered, anti-heal and damage over time effects. ** Prevents stunned, knocked down, knocked back, asleep, hooked and frozen but does not remove them. *** Does not protect Zarya from knockbacks from attacks that can pierce barriers, like [[File:Rocket_punch.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Rocket Punch|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Rocket Punch|Rocket Punch]] or [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]]. ** Prevents Junkrat's [[File:Ability-Junkrat3.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Steel Trap|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Steel Trap|Steel Trap]] from activating but does not remove its effects. ** Does not unstick stuck projectiles, like [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]], [[File:Jagged_Blade_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|Jagged Blade]] or [[File:Tracking Shot.png|sub|link=Sierra#Tracking Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Tracking Shot|Tracking Shot]]. ** Does not prevent or remove ''Could not find 'Graviton Surge' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] or [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]]. * Even if the barrier is destroyed, it will protect Zarya from the attack that broke it. ** Reinhardt's [[File:Ability-reinhardt5.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Earthshatter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Earthshatter|Earthshatter]] can hit Zarya with the shockwave and stun her if the close range critical hit broke the barrier. ** Vendetta's [[File:Sundering Blade.png|sub|link=Vendetta#Sundering Blade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Sundering Blade|Sundering Blade]] completely ignores Zarya defense, deals damage to Zarya and her barrier at the same time.

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted (allies)
raw.official description: Create a damage barrier around an ally.
raw.ability details: * Charges are shared with [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle Barrier]]. The charge cooldown of the next charge is set depending on which ability was used. * Projected Barrier behaves identically to Particle Barrier, excluding following differences: ** Projected Barrier cannot be used on the same target again for an additional 2 seconds after it has expired or been broken. ** Projected Barrier unfreezes targets frozen by [[File:Ability-mei4.png|sub|link=Mei#Blizzard|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Blizzard|Blizzard]].

raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 55 while firing (0% charge) (40 overall w/reload) * Damage per second: 110 while firing (100% charge (80 overall w/reload) * Grenades can still be fired even with less than 25 ammo, dealing full damage. * The projectile can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before it impacts, but the impact explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified. * Self-damage is blocked by ''Could not find 'Particle Barrier' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', but does not generate energy.

raw.official description: Launch a gravity well that pulls enemies to it.
raw.damage:
5 (impact)
5 per second (over time)
raw.ability keywords: area of effect;;spherical::armor piercing::barrier collide::fixed::hinder::travel time::immobilize
raw.ability details: * All [[movement abilities]] are disabled within the effect of Graviton Surge. * The projectile is blocked by [[barrier]]s, activating upon contact, but the area of effect pierces barriers. * The projectile can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before it impacts, but the area is unaffected. * The impact damage can be amplified, but periodic damage cannot. * Impact damage is affected by [[armor]], but the periodic damage completely ignores armor's damage reduction. * Both impact damage and periodic damage are affected by other forms of [[damage reduction]]. * Periodic damage starts 0.47 seconds after the projectile lands. * Graviton Surge cannot be removed or prevented by abilities that grant [[invincible]] or [[phased out]] status effect. * Targets can be pulled out of Graviton Surge by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]]. * Targets can be lifted out of Graviton Surge by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]], provided it can be activated. * Reinhardt is unaffected by Graviton Surge while casting [[File:Ability-reinhardt5.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Earthshatter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Earthshatter|Earthshatter]].
